entry.title: A Brief Introduction of Ulcerative Colitis
Bioinformatics - Lecture 4 Types and Tests of Genetic Variation & Functional Annotation of Genetic Variation
Wikipedia, now I have my own page
entry.content:
Wikipedia, now I have my own user page

During the class break today, I was browsing Wikipedia as I usually do.

Suddenly I just wanna have my own user page.

So, here we are: User:HTsien - Wikipedia

Contact me if any problem.

entry.content:
中国药科大学   钱鸿颉 学生个人课表
学年学期：2020-2021-2    班级：药学（中外）1903501    所属班级：药学（生化与药理方向）    学院：生命科学与技术学院
　 星期一 星期二 星期三 星期四 星期五 星期六 星期日
第一大节      Being a Biomolecular Scientist 2:Biochemist
     纪雪梅(副教授)
     2-17[单周]
     
     		      Introduction to Immunology
     胡加亮(教授)
     1-17[周](020304节)
     
     A204
     		      大学英语（四）
     刘中荣(讲师)
     1-17[周]
     D306
     		      药事法规
     梁毅(教授)
     1-17[周]
     A208
     
第二大节      Being a Biomolecular Scientist 2:Biochemist

     2-17[单周]
     
     		      体育（四）
     叶平(副教授)
     1-17[周]
     
     		      Introduction to Immunology
     胡加亮(教授)
     1-17[周](020304节)
     
     A204
     
第三大节      Introduction to Biochemistry
     叶俊梅(副教授)
     1-3[周]
     A306
     
     Introduction to Biochemistry
     宋潇达(讲师)
     4-7[周]
     A306
     		      大学英语（四）
     李白(讲师)
     1-17[周]
     B404
     		      生物信息学

     9-17[周]
     B112
     
     生物信息学

     1-8[周]
     B112
     		      线性代数
     孙爱玲(讲师)
     1-17[周]
     E206

entry.title: A possible biosynthesis pathway of arctigenin in Arctium lappa L.
First Post on My Blog
entry.content:
Greetings, mates!

I believe it would be a wonderful journey to write on the Internet in my own spot.

Thank you for any support and suggestions!😄
entry.summary:
Greetings, mates!

I believe it would be a wonderful journey to write on the Internet in my own spot.

Thank you for any supp
